zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield於1378年出生在英國素福爾可貝汀菲兒時，她的父親Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar31歲，母親Isabel Ramsay28歲。她於1399年與Thomas Bedingfield在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1406年在她的家鄉享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield于1378年出生在英国素福爾可貝汀菲兒时，她的父亲Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar31岁，母亲Isabel Ramsay28岁。她于1399年与Thomas Bedingfield在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1406年在她的家乡享年28岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可貝汀菲兒。

nameMeanings.name: Ogilvy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Ogilvie
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Oglesby  , a habitational name from the barony of Ogilvie in Glamis (Angus), whose name is probably Pictish, of uncertain origin and meaning.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield was born in 1378, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, was 31 and her mother, Isabel Ramsay, was 28. She married Thomas Bedingfield in 1399, in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1406, in her hometown, at the age of 28, and was buried in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield est née en 1378, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel Ramsay, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Bedingfield en 1399, à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1406, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Bedingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield 1378 in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar 31 und ihre Mutter Isabel Ramsay 28. Sie hat 1399 in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Thomas Bedingfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1406 im Alter von 28 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield è nata il nel 1378 nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isabel Ramsay, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Bedingfield nel 1399, nel Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1406, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfieldが1378年にイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfarは31歳，母Isabel Ramsayは28歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドでThomas Bedingfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1406年に故郷で28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクベディングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield(이)가 1378년 영국 수폴크 베딩필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel Ramsay(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에서 Thomas Bedingfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 그녀의 고향에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베딩필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield nasceu em 1378, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Ramsay, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Bedingfield em 1399, em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1406, em sua cidade natal, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield родилась в 1378 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel Ramsay, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Bedingfield в 1399 г. в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1406 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности бедингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Ogilvy of Auchterhouse, latterly of Bedingfield nació en 1378, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Ogilvy of Wester Powrie, of Auchterhouse - Sheriff of Forfar, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel Ramsay, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Thomas Bedingfield en 1399, en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1406, en su pueblo, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Bedingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
